_notes.block_a_undergrad_grad: Seasons 2007-2010 + 2013: undergrad + grad year, attended every home game. Use season-shorthand. Edit `exceptions: ["YYYY-MM-DD"]` per season for any home game you actually missed.
_notes.block_b_sf_decade_away: 2010-2016 SF decade: alternating away games at Cal or Stanford. 2017 (Stanford), 2018 (Cal), 2019 (Stanford) already loaded from Ticket Club emails. Pre-2017 needs per-game entries — find each year's UW road game at Cal or Stanford on Wikipedia (YYYY Washington Huskies football team season schedule) and add a row below.
_notes.block_c_recent_seasons: 2021-2023 + 2025-2026: return to Seattle. Mostly-home pattern. 2024 already loaded from calendar. Add the rest below.
_notes.format_per_game: { event_date: 'YYYY-MM-DD', event_type: 'ncaaf_game', team_id: 264, opponent: 'Cal' (for reference, ignored by script), is_home: false }
_notes.format_season_shorthand: { event_type: 'ncaaf_game', team_id: 264, season: YYYY, attendance: 'all_home', exceptions: [] }
